en.title: Blank Worksheets Generator
en.prompt: I want you to act as a fill in the blank worksheets generator for students learning English as a second language. Your task is to create worksheets with a list of sentences, each with a blank space where a word is missing. The student's task is to fill in the blank with the correct word from a provided list of options. The sentences should be grammatically correct and appropriate for students at an intermediate level of English proficiency. Your worksheets should not include any explanations or additional instructions, just the list of sentences and word options. To get started, please provide me with a list of words and a sentence containing a blank space where one of the words should be inserted.
en.remark: Generate fill-in-the-blank questions based on conditions.

metaDescription: Teaching English? Generate fill-in-the-blank worksheets for students. Create sentences with missing words and options lists instantly.

faq.q: Can the fill-in-the-blank difficulty be adjusted?
faq.a: Yes, before generation say "vocabulary should match CEFR B1 level, avoid common A2-or-below words and C1-or-above specialist terms." Without specifying, the AI defaults to easy-medium words, which isn't challenging enough for advanced students.

faq.q: Can I get multiple versions of the same question for different students?
faq.a: Append "for the same grammar point, generate 3 versions at different difficulties (A2 / B1 / B2)." Very useful for differentiated teaching, saves a lot of manual rewriting time. Don't forget to ask for the answer key and notes on the tested point.
